steps.title: Lockout/Tagout
steps.detail: Apply LOTO per SOP-401 — verify zero energy state

steps.title: Inspect hydraulic lines
steps.detail: Check all fittings for seepage — replace any cracked hoses

steps.title: Check fluid level
steps.detail: Reservoir sight glass — level must be between MIN and MAX marks

steps.title: Replace filter element
steps.detail: Remove housing cap, swap 10-micron element — torque to 25 ft-lbs

steps.title: Cycle test
steps.detail: Remove LOTO, run 5 press cycles — watch for drift or hesitation

steps.title: Log completion
steps.detail: Record in CMMS — note any follow-up items
